g.text: Sample Count Variance (10ms execution at 100 Hz)

div.p: Key Insight: Sampling is statistical approximation, not exact measurement. Prime frequencies (19, 49, 99, 999 Hz) avoid synchronization with common application periodicities. Always run profiles long enough for statistical convergence (≥100 samples per function of interest).
Result: Always see do_work() as 100% hot Reality: App sleeps 95% of time!
Result: Samples cover work AND sleep phases Statistical truth: ~5% in do_work(), ~95% in sleep
